project_name: AI Powered Code Editor for Clinical Trials
description: AI-powered code editor end-to-end to assist in clinical trial data analysis.
key_points: Build sophisticated AI Agent with code creation, editing, and shell commands execution capabilities.
Fully integrated support for MCP servers
Developed a user-friendly interface with Angular and FastAPI.

description: Provide a user-friendly open-source library for building conversational AI agents with LLMs.
key_points: Created and maintained an open-source library called Interact as an alternative to LangChain.
Provided a user-friendly API for building conversational agents with LLMs.

description: Advanced LLM finetuning for converting SAS codes into R.
key_points: Finetuned a large language model to convert SAS code to R and vice versa.
Prepare synthetic dataset with prompt and response pairs for code conversion.

description: Evaluate visual presentations for doctors with computer according to design guidelines.
key_points: Analyzed visual aids shown to doctors for visual appeal.
Optimized the design of slides by improving color balance and layout.

project_name: Interact with My Resume Using LLM
description: Developed an interactive portfolio application with personal AI Agent.
key_points: Developed a large language model to interact with the resume and answer queries about experience, skills, and projects.
Build RAG and function calling capabilities for interactive experience.
Developed a React application for the front-end.

project_name: Auto Team Detection of Bundesliga Matches
description: Automate sports analytics with AI-driven team and ball detection for Bundesliga matches.
key_points: Used YOLOv7 for human and ball detection.
Applied computer vision and ML methods to detect jersey colors.

description: Transform business data into actionable insights using AI and classical statistics.
key_points: Developed models to understand business data, trends, and generate actionable insights.

description: Crop analysis with drone-based image segmentation and hybrid mapping.
key_points: Developed a model to segment crop leaves from drone images.
Segment grid like plots in the field and map them to appropriate hybrids.

description: Generate restaurant descriptions in natural language from structured data using transformers.
key_points: Built a transformer-based model from scratch to convert structured data about restaurants into text.
Work on novel approaches to improve the quality of generated text.

description: Discover genetic patterns with advanced clustering and interactive visualizations.
key_points: Implemented clustering algorithm to group similar genotypes based on genetic makeup.
Visualized clusters using UMAP.

description: Validate genetic clusters with hierarchical visualization for deeper insights.
key_points: Validated and visualized clustering algorithm with genetic hierarchy.

description: Visualize and analyze social media engagement with machine learning.
key_points: Developed a model to analyze social media interaction and engagement data.
Built a dashboard to visualize trends and engagement metrics.

project_name: Predicting Survival Chances of Passengers in Titanic
description: Predict Titanic survival with robust ensemble models and feature engineering.
key_points: Built an ensemble model combining decision trees, random forests, and other classifiers.
Achieved high prediction accuracy using ensemble learning.

description: Uncover insurance trends in Chicago using regression and data analysis.
key_points: Performed linear regression and outlier detection.
Analyzed trends in insurance availability and demographic impact.

description: Classify ancient skulls with discriminant and factor analysis in R.
key_points: Applied linear discriminant analysis and factor analysis to classify skulls of different ages.

description: Accelerate incident investigations with a custom search engine using BM25 and tf-idf.
key_points: Built a search engine from scratch for incident investigations within the company.
Use of BM25 and tf-idf for fast and accurate search results.

description: Boost product stability testing with predictive modeling and historical data analysis.
key_points: Predicted whether a product will fail in a particular test based on past timepoints and historical data.
Improved stability testing accuracy by 15%.

description: Reduce manufacturing errors by analyzing batch quality and root causes.
key_points: Identified reasons behind poor quality in manufactured batches of a drug.
Reduced error rates in batch production by 12%.

description: Optimize medical visit schedules with intelligent genetic algorithms.
key_points: Created an intelligent scheduler using a genetic algorithm for medical representative visits.
Increased scheduling efficiency by 25%.

description: Recommend top brands and products using data-driven analysis of prescriptions.
key_points: Suggested relevant products and brands based on past prescriptions and brand popularity.

description: Drive performance improvement with actionable root cause analysis and ML.
key_points: Conducted root cause analysis of poor performance at headquarters.
Proposed actionable solutions to improve performance by 10%.
